headline.purpose: Arabic page titles and major dialog headings.

body.purpose: Primary Arabic interface copy and values.

label.purpose: Form labels, metadata, and compact support text.

shadows.name: surface-low
shadows.purpose: Minimal separation for grids and chart surfaces.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and compact state feedback.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Dialogs, menus, and larger state transitions.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Instant state updates when reduced motion is requested.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action in a management workflow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; padding: 10px 16px; font: 600 14px/1.5 Cairo, 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #93c5fd; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #1e40af; }

components.name: Ghost Utility Button
components.description: A quiet secondary or row-level utility action.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #475569; padding: 10px 12px; font: 600 14px/1.5 Cairo, 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #93c5fd; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Arabic Text Field
components.description: A persistent-label field for Arabic management forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #475569; font: 600 13px/1.5 Cairo, 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; direction: rtl; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: #0f172a; padding: 10px 12px; font: 400 15px/1.6 Cairo, 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; } .ds-field input:hover { border-color: #94a3b8; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { border-color: #2563eb; outline: 3px solid #dbeafe; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Active Navigation Item
components.description: The current destination in the Operational Navy sidebar.
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; border-radius: 10px; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; padding: 11px 14px; font: 500 15px/1.5 Cairo, 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(37,99,235,.35); } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-nav-active:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #93c5fd; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Working Surface
components.description: A restrained container for grids, charts, and reports.
components.html:
قائمة العملاء

محتوى تشغيلي منظم داخل سطح عمل واضح.
components.css: .ds-surface { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 14px; background: #fff; color: #0f172a; padding: 16px; font-family: Cairo, 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; } .ds-surface h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-surface p { margin: 0; color: #475569; line-height: 1.7; } .ds-surface:focus-within { border-color: #2563eb; }

components.name: Status Tag
components.description: A compact status label that pairs semantic color with Arabic text.
components.css: .ds-status-positive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 999px; background: #dcfce7; color: #166534; padding: 4px 10px; font: 600 12px/1.5 Cairo, 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; } .ds-status-positive:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #86efac; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: AlFaris should feel like a well-organized management desk: important records are visible, controls are where experienced users expect them, and every visual decision supports a concrete operational task. The system is Arabic-first and right-to-left, with Cairo typography, a bright working surface, and a stable dark navigation frame. The interface is clear, efficient, simple, and professional. Density is purposeful rather than sparse. Generic AI-generated styling, glow effects, glass surfaces, excessive gradients, and ornamental dashboard elements are explicitly rejected.
keyCharacteristics: Arabic-first RTL structure and Cairo typography.
Restrained slate surfaces with blue reserved for actions and selection.
Compact, familiar controls suited to repeated management work.
Clear hierarchy through spacing, borders, and typography before shadow.
Responsive structures that preserve task order and keyboard usability.

rules.name: The Action Rarity Rule
rules.body: Action Blue should occupy less than 10% of a typical screen. Its scarcity preserves meaning.

rules.name: The Working Surface Rule
rules.body: Operational content remains on light surfaces for sustained daytime use; dark color belongs to navigation and identity framing.

rules.name: The No Glow Rule
rules.body: Glow effects are forbidden. Focus must use a crisp outline or border change, never luminous decoration.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Use Cairo throughout the product UI. Do not introduce display or Latin-first fonts for visual novelty.

rules.name: The Arabic Rhythm Rule
rules.body: Preserve comfortable Arabic line height and natural RTL reading order; never compress labels to imitate dense Latin dashboards.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: A resting component uses either a structural border or a low shadow. It never uses a border plus a wide decorative shadow.

rules.name: The State Elevation Rule
rules.body: Elevation indicates hierarchy or interaction state, not prestige or visual richness.

dos: Do reserve Action Blue for primary actions, active navigation, links, focus, and selection.
Do use Cairo consistently and preserve Arabic-first RTL reading, navigation, and form order.
Do use familiar PrimeNG interaction behavior while standardizing spacing, radius, state, and copy.
Do use borders, spacing, and surface contrast before adding elevation.
Do meet WCAG 2.2 AA contrast, keyboard navigation, screen-reader, and reduced-motion requirements.
donts: Don't use interfaces that visibly resemble generic AI-generated designs.
Don't use decorative glow effects, glassmorphism, or luminous focus styling.
Don't use excessive gradients, ornamental dashboard decoration, or visual novelty that competes with operational data.
Don't inflate ordinary content into repeated oversized cards or nest cards inside cards.
Don't rely on color alone for status, financial direction, validation, or selection.
